gems.name: google-cloud-gemini_data_analytics-v1beta
gems.info: The Gemini Data Analytics API enables developers to build intelligent data analytics applications. Leverage AI-powered chat interfaces to allow users to interact with and analyze structured data using natural language. Note that google-cloud-gemini_data_analytics-v1beta is a version-specific client library. For most uses, we recommend installing the main client library google-cloud-gemini_data_analytics instead. See the readme for more details.
